prompts.name: analyze_drift
prompts.description: Analyze drift between installed versions (inventory) and declared versions (terraform).
prompts.template:
Compare the following installed add-on inventory with the Terraform-declared versions. Identify any version drift and classify each as: in-sync, minor-drift, or major-drift.

## Installed Inventory
```json
{inventory_json}
```

## Terraform Declarations
```json
{terraform_json}
```

Produce a table with columns: Component, Installed Version, Declared Version, Drift Status.

prompts.name: changelog_research
prompts.description: Generate a research prompt for changelog analysis between two versions.
prompts.template:
Research the changelog for **{package}** from version **{from_version}** to **{to_version}**.

For each version in the range:
1. Find the GitHub release notes or CHANGELOG.md entries
2. Flag any breaking changes, deprecations, or required migration steps
3. Note new features that may be relevant

Summarize findings with a risk assessment: LOW / MEDIUM / HIGH.

prompts.name: upgrade_plan
prompts.description: Generate an upgrade plan from a drift analysis.

params.name: drift_analysis
params.description: Drift analysis output to base the plan on

prompts.template:
Based on the following drift analysis, produce a step-by-step upgrade plan.

## Drift Analysis
{drift_analysis}

Requirements:
- Order updates by dependency (control plane first, then add-ons, then Helm releases)
- For each component, specify: current version, target version, update method (Terraform / CLI / Helm)
- Flag any components that require a specific update sequence
- Include rollback steps for each component
